summary: This topic describes how to assign transport details (vehicle route and pick-up point) to multiple students simultaneously using an Excel upload. This method is efficient for initial assignments or promoting students with similar transport arrangements.
steps: Prepare the Excel file with the following columns:
'Vehicle Route' (the name of the route defined in the system).
'Pick-up Point' (the name of the pick-up point defined for that route).
Choose the prepared Excel file from your system.
Click 'Submit' to upload and assign transport details to students.
business_rules: Each student must have a unique 'Reg Number' for identification.
The 'Vehicle Route' and 'Pick-up Point' names in the Excel must exactly match those defined in the system.
Upon successful upload, the system automatically fetches and applies the corresponding transport fees to the student's demand.
important_notes: This method is particularly useful for promoting students from a previous session, where transport details often remain similar. The previous session's transport report can be exported and adapted for the new session's bulk upload.
The 'Vehicle Number' is not required in the Excel, as it is implicitly linked to the 'Vehicle Route'.
questions: How can I assign transport routes to many students at once?
What information is needed in the Excel file for bulk transport assignment?
Does the system automatically calculate transport fees after bulk assignment?
Can I use this feature to assign transport to promoted students?
Why is the vehicle number not required in the bulk upload Excel?
